nodes.label: Input Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Input; styled HTML input with focus-visible ring, disabled:opacity-50, consistent height

nodes.label: Label Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Label on @radix-ui/react-label with cva; peer-disabled:opacity-70 for form accessibility

nodes.label: Menubar Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Menubar on @radix-ui/react-menubar; horizontal application menubar with Menu, Trigger, Content, Item, CheckboxItem, RadioItem, SubTrigger, SubContent

nodes.label: NavigationMenu Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui NavigationMenu on @radix-ui/react-navigation-menu; top-nav with hover dropdowns, NavigationMenuList, Item, Trigger, Content, Link, Indicator, Viewport

nodes.label: Pagination Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Pagination; exports Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis built with Button component

nodes.label: Popover Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Popover on @radix-ui/react-popover; floating content panel anchored to trigger element

nodes.label: Progress Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Progress on @radix-ui/react-progress; horizontal progress bar with animated indicator, value prop controls width

nodes.label: RadioGroup Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui RadioGroup on @radix-ui/react-radio-group; RadioGroup container and RadioGroupItem with CircleIcon indicator

nodes.label: Resizable Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Resizable on react-resizable-panels; ResizablePanelGroup, ResizablePanel, ResizableHandle for split-pane layouts

nodes.label: ScrollArea Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui ScrollArea on @radix-ui/react-scroll-area; custom-styled scrollbar overlay with Viewport, ScrollBar, Corner

nodes.label: Select Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Select on @radix-ui/react-select; custom dropdown selector with SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectLabel, SelectSeparator, SelectScrollUpButton, SelectScrollDownButton

nodes.label: Separator Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Separator on @radix-ui/react-separator; thin hr/vr divider line with horizontal/vertical orientation

nodes.label: Sheet Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Sheet on @radix-ui/react-dialog; slide-in panel from top/right/bottom/left edge, SheetContent uses side cva variants

nodes.label: Skeleton Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Skeleton; pulsing gray placeholder for loading states, accepts className for sizing

nodes.label: Slider Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Slider on @radix-ui/react-slider; range/single-value slider with Track, Range, Thumb

nodes.label: Sonner Toaster
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Sonner integration; wraps Toaster from sonner package with theme-aware styling

nodes.label: Switch Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Switch on @radix-ui/react-switch; toggle with Thumb that slides on state change

nodes.label: Table Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Table; semantic HTML table wrappers: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption with responsive overflow

nodes.label: Tabs Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Tabs on @radix-ui/react-tabs; TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent for tab-panel navigation

nodes.label: Textarea Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Textarea; styled multi-line text input matching Input component styling

nodes.label: Toast Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Toast on @radix-ui/react-toast; ToastProvider, ToastViewport, Toast, ToastTitle, ToastDescription, ToastClose, ToastAction with variant cva

nodes.label: Toaster Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Toaster; renders active toasts from useToast hook state into ToastProvider/ToastViewport

nodes.label: ToggleGroup Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui ToggleGroup on @radix-ui/react-toggle-group; multi-item toggle bar where items share variant context

nodes.label: Toggle Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Toggle on @radix-ui/react-toggle; single pressed/unpressed button with default/outline/sm/lg variants via cva

nodes.label: Tooltip Component
nodes.description: shadcn/ui Tooltip on @radix-ui/react-tooltip; TooltipProvider wraps app, Tooltip+TooltipTrigger+TooltipContent for hover hints

hyperedges.label: Notification and Toast System
hyperedges.description: Three components forming the toast notification layer: toast.jsx defines primitives, toaster.jsx renders them from hook state, sonner.jsx provides an alternative implementation

hyperedges.label: Single-Selection Input Controls
hyperedges.description: Three components for choosing from a set of options: radio-group (visible options), select (dropdown), checkbox (multi-select capable) — all integrate with react-hook-form

hyperedges.label: Text Input Form Primitives
hyperedges.description: Core text entry components that share styling conventions and are composed together in form layouts
